title: The Dancing of Isaac ♪ | Totem of Undying
description: Dance Kid, Dance! | Replaces Totem of Undying
body:
## 🎧 ♪ SURVIVE DEATH WITH A FUNKY STYLE! ♪ 🎧
▼ **This Resource Pack replaces the Totem of Undying with Dancing Isaac! (Includes a Custom Sound too!)**

![Isaac](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/769b57f37aaa2faa0d0f10ed6e2e74a4be202ade.gif) ![blueblue](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/70dc393752a78b4438424c7b90f9e4b8f1f57804.gif) ![KPE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74bb8cc379f0844c8514272e3f0b25791648d911.gif) ![FORGER](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0dc14e996c52241564b4b04b44732b1d1e52e962.gif) ![LOSS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0f19130f6a95be61700cde5b54c78371442ad61.gif)

**■ Works with Vanilla Minecraft, but you need [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) or [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) to access the variants**

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/8pZCAOP7hFE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**‎ - - - CHARACTER TOTEM VARIANTS - - -**

**► Rename a Totem to one of the names from the list to get them.**

![Rename](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03e06aa4f5aa368c1a8f081bdeece20123ce577b.png)

**▼ Totem Variant List ▼**

• Blue Baby

![Blue](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/70dc393752a78b4438424c7b90f9e4b8f1f57804.gif)

• The Keeper

![Keeper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74bb8cc379f0844c8514272e3f0b25791648d911.gif)

• The Forgotten

![Forgor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7cc87b1d06ead71bfe551b0d0315abc8d9ee2049.gif)

• The Lost

![Skill Issue](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0f19130f6a95be61700cde5b54c78371442ad61.gif)

**► CREDITS ◄**

**Sprite and Model Credits to [Devector](https://x.com/LimboLowpo)**

**The Sprites come from [Specialist Dance for Good Items](https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2575911103) (The Binding Of Isaac: Repetance)**
